friendly_name: Scope failure detection to real channels
purpose_context: The analyzer flags any event whose text mentions an error pattern (narrative, code edits, reasoning) as a real failure, inflating counts and undermining trust. This mission scopes detection to genuine output plus a few distinctive diagnostic signals, so reported failures reflect what truly occurred, without losing valid detections like branch/worktree confusion.
purpose_tldr: Stop the analyzer reporting failures that were only discussed or written in code, not actually executed.
